history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, low-angle shot captures a person wearing glasses and a black jacket, their face partially obscured by their hand as they touch their forehead. The person has dark, messy hair and a small earring in their left ear. They are looking down and to the side, with a pensive or introspective expression. The image has a strong blue color cast, giving it a moody, almost dreamlike quality. The lighting is dim and appears to be coming from a screen, illuminating the face and hand. In the foreground, a laptop keyboard is visible, and on the screen, a desktop interface shows various app icons and a timer displaying "00:00." A dark-colored smartphone with a prominent camera bump is also visible on the screen, reflecting the ambient light. The background is a textured, dimly lit wall, adding to the overall atmosphere of quiet contemplation or late-night work. The style is reminiscent of a candid, slightly blurry photograph taken in low light, with a focus on the subject's mood and the digital environment.
